character.name: Xiao
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi ally young hunter ranger archer, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, total body height equals 3 head heights stacked,
large head with big expressive eyes, short body, small hands and feet,
wild young forest hunter and master archer who grew up alone in the deep woods,
young teenage boy mid-teens around 15-17 years old, smooth youthful unshaven face NOT a man, NO beard, NO stubble, NO mustache, NO crow's feet, no facial hair at all,
sun-tanned slightly weathered skin from outdoor life, sharp narrow predator eyes with a fierce alert wild gaze, a long thin diagonal scar across right cheek, slight scowl,
looks distinctly different from a noble knight hero, looks like a feral woodland kid, NOT a clean handsome princely face,
shoulder length messy unkempt dark brown hair with two small thin side braids hanging down in front of the shoulders one on each side framing the face, the rest of the hair loose and wild with untamed bangs falling across the forehead,
dark forest green and brown leather hunter armor: leather chest cuirass over dark green sleeveless tunic, brown leather pauldrons reinforced with bone studs, dark green forearm wraps over leather bracers, brown leather belt with brass buckle, brown leather hunting boots,
small grey wolf fur pelt draped over left shoulder as a short shoulder mantle, no hood,
necklace of small carved bone beads at the collar,
recurved wooden hunter longbow with brass-bound limbs held vertically in left hand, undrawn, slightly taller than him,
brown leather quiver full of feathered arrows on back, single hunting knife sheathed at right hip,
dark brown loose hair and the two small side braids drawn IN FRONT OF and OVER the grey wolf fur shoulder mantle, hair never tucked under any cloth layer,
no helmet, no plate armor, no shield, no cape,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
